wikitext.*:
There are currently around fifty floor colors in 5 styles. [[File:FloorsRedCircled.png|thumb]] They are offered in the [[Everyday Collection]] section of [[Finkea Furnishings]]. Scroll all the way down to the bottom of the shop page to find them. They are the second-to-last item, right next to the plain wallpapers. The menu display color of the icon may change, but it can be switched back to your preference. Click to try a floor color in your birbhouse. To switch the color, scroll across the bottom. All color choices will show, except for ones you have already purchased. The styles: *Traditional *Dark *Light *Vibrant *Vintage Floors were initially released August 2022 with the implementation of [[Birbhouse|birbhouses]] and the release of the [[Simple Collection]]. Additional colors and styles have been released since. ==Traditional == {| class= "fandom-table" style="text-align:center" |+Traditional Floor 500 Stones !Color !Image |- |Red |[[File:FloorRed.jpg|center|frameless|thumb]]{{Clear}} {{Clear}}[Show/Hide
